title: Codex PostToolUse Hook Input
description: Stdin JSON payload delivered to PostToolUse hooks by Codex.

permission_mode.description: The permission mode Codex is running in.

transcript_path.description: Path to the session transcript (may be null).

cwd.description: Working directory of the Codex agent.

turn_id.description: Identifier for the current conversation turn.

tool_name.description: Name of the tool that was invoked.

tool_use_id.description: Unique identifier for this tool use instance.

tool_response.description: The tool's execution result (any JSON value).
